series_metadata.series_title: High School Equivalence Transcript Requests or Duplicate Diploma Requests
series_metadata.series_description: These include requests for a duplicate copy of a diploma or for a High School Equivalence (GED) transcript. These requests may come from third parties.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for six months, then discard. ; Electronic: Retain for six months, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
